name: Cholent
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Boneless beef chuck (cut into 4 equal pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans in water to cover overnight.
2. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
3. Drain the beans and place them in a large clay bean pot with the meat, potatoes, onion, salt, and pepper.
4. Add enough water to just reach the top of the ingredients, about 1 1/2 cups. Cover the pot tightly first with a piece of aluminum foil, then with the lid of the pot.
5. Bake for 30 minutes at 350°F.
6. Reduce heat to 200°F and bake for an additional 10 hours or more. Do not disturb in any way.
7. Serve the cholent in soup plates, adding a little hot chicken broth if desired.
